open_positions.title: Lead Water Technician
open_positions.desc: Join our mitigation team as a Lead Water Technician. You'll be responsible for water extraction, structural drying, and guiding junior technicians through the restoration process.

open_positions.title: Reconstruction Project Manager
open_positions.desc: We're looking for an experienced Project Manager to oversee remodeling and reconstruction projects from start to finish, coordinating with clients, subcontractors, and the insurance team.

open_positions.title: Mitigation Project Coordinator
open_positions.desc: Coordinate mitigation projects, liaise between field technicians and project managers, and ensure projects are completed on time and within scope.
requirements: Prior restoration or construction coordination experience

open_positions.title: Reconstruction Specialist
open_positions.desc: Perform high-quality reconstruction work including drywall, flooring, painting, and finish carpentry on residential restoration and remodeling projects.

cta.heading: Ready to Make a Difference?
cta.description: We're always looking for talented, dedicated professionals to join our growing team. Apply now through Indeed or reach out to us directly.
